title: Strongthium Predator 212 Tune Up Parts Carb Kit for 196cc 200cc 212cc 224cc + Pull Start + Coil + Air Filter Assembly + Spark Plug + Throttle Springs + Gaskets
features: The Aftermarket tune up parts set is for Honda replica Predator Coleman Baja Tillotson Lifan 196cc 200cc 212cc 224cc GX140 GX 120 160 200 168 168f 170 170f 160cc 4HP 5.5HP 6.5HP Engines.
The carb air filter & recoil parts kit fits for Harbor Freight Predator 212 224 cc ghost engine, Ct200u Bt200x KT196 RB200 RT200 Mb200 Baja Warrior Baja Heat and many others.
Fits many brands' similar motors, pressure washers, water pumps, trash pumps, tiller, mini bike, go karts, log splitters, air compressors and many others.
Suitable for making your old engine workable in reasonable low cost, please note the parts are not original ones.

Package includes 1set carburetor & mounting gaskets, 1pcs pull cord assembly, 1x air filter assy & 2pcs extra foam, 1pcs fuel line, 1pcs ignition coil, 1pcs spark plug, 1pcs AVR, 1set throttle spring, 1pcs valve cover & 1pcs exhaust gaskets.
